The mains supply is 230 V ~ 50 Hz fused at 3 A.
The mains supply is 230 V ~ 50 Hz fused at 3 A.

technical_specs.value: 3 core 0.75 mm 3183Y multi strand flexible type

source_refs.source_quote: The boiler must be connected to the mains fused 3 A 230 V 50 HZ supply & control system using cable of 3 core 0.75 mm 3183Y multi strand flexible type.
The pressure relief valve is set at 3 bar
The pressure relief discharge pipe should be not less than 15 mm diameter
This must be AT LEAST 17.5 mb (Natural Gas)
or 29.5 mb (LPG) !
CO₂% nominal & range of tolerance Max 10.3% (10.2 to 10.7)
CO₂% nominal & range of tolerance Min 9.7% (9.2 to 9.8)
O₂% nominal & range of tolerance Max 5.2% (5.4 to 4.6)
O₂% nominal & range of tolerance Min 6.1% (6.9 to 6.0)
CO₂% nominal & range of tolerance Max 10.0% (10.0 to 10.5)
CO₂% nominal & range of tolerance Min 9.6% (9.2 to 9.8)
O₂% nominal & range of tolerance Max 5.7% (5.7 to 4.9)
O₂% nominal & range of tolerance Min 6.3% (6.9 to 6.0)
CO₂ % (maximum) 8.8 to 9.4
CO₂ % (minimum) 8.1 to 8.6

fault_codes.description: Low pressure in heating circuit (permanently)
manufacturer_steps: Check the system pressure and restore it

manufacturer_steps: Check the electrode, gas supply and flue pipe

source_refs.source_quote: H.03 .02 Temporary flame loss Check the electrode, gas supply and flue pipe

fault_codes.description: Maximum temperature difference value between flow and return reached.

source_refs.source_quote: H.01 .05 Maximum temperature difference value between flow and return reached. Check the boiler/installation circulation Check the installation pressure

manufacturer_steps: Check the electrode, gas supply and flue pipe

source_refs.source_quote: E.04 .10 Burner failed to ignite after 4 attempts Check the electrode, gas supply and flue pipe

fault_codes.description: Flow temperature increase during domestic hot water operation too fast

source_refs.source_quote: H.01 .21 Flow temperature increase during domestic hot water operation too fast Check the boiler/installation circulation Check the installation pressure

manufacturer_steps: Check the operation of the pressure sensor and system pressure

source_refs.source_quote: H.00 .42 Pressure sensor open/faulty Check the operation of the pressure sensor and system pressure

fault_codes.description: Flow temperature increase in heating mode too quick. Temporary stoppage of 10 minutes.

fault_codes.description: No water circulation (temporary).

source_refs.source_quote: H.01 .18 No water circulation (temporary). Check the boiler/installation circulation Check the installation pressure

source_refs.source_quote: E.04 .03 Maximum flow temperature exceeded or flow temperature sensor short circuited Check the boiler/installation circulation Check the installation pressure

fault_codes.description: Solar temperature sensor is either removed or measures a temperature below range
manufacturer_steps: Check the solar temperature sensor wiring.
In case of removal of the solar tank, set the parameter DP150=1.

source_refs.source_quote: A.00 .28 Solar temperature sensor is either removed or measures a temperature below range Check the solar temperature sensor wiring. Replace the sensor if necessary. In case of removal of the solar tank, set the parameter DP150=1.

fault_codes.description: Solar temperature sensor is either shorted or measures a temperature above range
manufacturer_steps: Check the solar temperature sensor wiring.

source_refs.source_quote: A.00 .29 Solar temperature sensor is either shorted or measures a temperature above range Check the solar temperature sensor wiring. Replace the sensor if necessary.

fault_codes.description: Outdoor temperature sensor expected but not detected
possible_causes: Outdoor sensor is not connected correctly
manufacturer_steps: Enter the correct value of the parameter AP091 (AP091=0)

source_refs.source_quote: A.00 .34 Outdoor temperature sensor expected but not detected Enter the correct value of the parameter AP091 (AP091=0) Connect the outdoor sensor Outdoor sensor is not connected correctly

fault_codes.description: Room unit disconnected
manufacturer_steps: Check the operation of the room unit.
When removing the room unit, switch the power supply off and on again and set parameter CP780 =0 to remove the error.

fault_codes.description: Ignition failure -flame monitoring
